name: LANDSTAR SYSTEM INC
summary: Landstar System, Inc. is a technology-enabled, asset-light provider of integrated transportation management solutions. The company delivers truckload, less-than-truckload, rail intermodal, air cargo, ocean cargo, expedited, heavy-haul, hazardous materials, and cross-border transportation services primarily throughout North America. Operations rely on approximately 960 independent commission sales agents and over 70,000 third-party capacity providers. Landstar also operates an insurance segment through Signature Insurance Company, reinsuring risks of independent contractors. Fiscal year 2025 consolidated revenue was $4.7 billion.

products.name: Truckload Transportation
products.description: Full array of truckload services via BCO Independent Contractors and Truck Brokerage Carriers using dry vans, platform trailers, and temperature-controlled equipment.

products.name: Less-Than-Truckload Transportation
products.description: LTL and other truck transportation services contributing approximately 2% of truck transportation revenue in fiscal 2025.

products.name: Rail Intermodal Services
products.description: Freight transport via trailer-on-flat-car, container-on-flat-car, box car and railcar throughout the US, Canada and Mexico.

products.name: Air Cargo Services
products.description: Domestic and international air freight as an IATA-certified Indirect Air Carrier.

products.name: Ocean Cargo Services
products.description: International ocean freight as an FMC-licensed NVOCC and ocean freight forwarder.

products.name: Expedited Transportation
products.description: Expedited ground and air delivery of time-critical freight.

products.name: Heavy-Haul/Specialized Transportation
products.description: Specialized transportation for heavy machinery, military equipment and oversized freight.

products.name: Insurance and Reinsurance
products.description: Risk and claims management, property/casualty insurance, and reinsurance for BCO Independent Contractors via Signature Insurance Company.

products.name: Customs Brokerage
products.description: Customs brokerage services for cross-border shipments.

products.name: Third Party Logistics Solutions
products.description: Comprehensive integrated transportation management solutions meeting all of a customer's transportation needs.

partnerships.description: Contracts enabling rail intermodal freight transport throughout the US, Canada and Mexico.

partnerships.partner_name: Stacktrain operators and container/trailing equipment companies
partnerships.description: Agreements supporting rail intermodal service capabilities including trailer and container on flat car.

partnerships.partner_name: Global network of foreign transportation intermediaries
partnerships.description: Relationships enabling international door-to-door air and ocean freight services worldwide.
Insurance programs for BCO Independent Contractors where risk is reinsured by Signature Insurance Company.
